delta_vs_b37: -3V mathematical (= measurement noise dominant, structural wins under-counted)

W2_stdlib_skills_core.notable: INC→REF x3 internal regression, surface migration

W3_control_ir_ops.notable: ARS guides arg names not action selection, incomplete-args attractor surfaces (S7 sources missing)

W4_permissions_and_safety.notable: S1 file__write canonical ✓, S6 drift: source_id (B36) -> source_name (B37) -> wrong action skill__index_events (B38)

W5_multi_agent_and_mcp.notable: CRITICAL: cold-start peer canonical CONFIRMED (B37 message -> B38 request), 97 peer agents in ARS

W6_plan_mode_fp0011.notable: R-WEB mcp_search routing chain CLOSED (2-batch structural chain: e5ecadb gate + 5e05b9b seed), residual = MCP external infra

W7_long_session_v1.description_length_impact: ok (3104ch, latency p50/p90 identical to B37)
W7_long_session_v1.notable: Single-agent 35-turn accumulated context still 100% clean (= stronger test than B37 per-scenario isolation)

structural_wins_primary_data.evidence: All 7 workers confirmed ARS block lists session-visible actions (header 'all session-visible actions'), W5 listed 97 peer agents
B37 args={message:...} -> B38 args={request:...} on agent.peer__researcher cold invoke
B36/B37 text -> B38 content, arg-normalize non-firing
B37 zero tool_calls -> B38 routing_decided{action=skill__mcp_search}+skill_run_spawned on 3 R-WEB scenarios
B37-OBS-1 default_api.web__search 0/17 LLM requests, web_search skip-log on every turn
35/35 clean at +44% description length, latency p50/p90 identical to B37

epsilon2_dilution.evidence: B37 V (decline) -> B38 R (asked for details). Hypothesis: ARS description growth (+86% from B37 baseline 2150ch -> 3991ch) dilutes implicit capability-constraint signal.
epsilon2_dilution.g31_match: ε2 (invoke_action stub) C-en rt 4->10 saturation pattern, but inverted direction (= bloat instead of strip, same dilution mechanism)

surface_fungibility.evidence: B37 W2 S1 source_id vs source mismatch + W4 S6 source_id->source_name drift NOT REPRODUCIBLE in B38: LLM took different wrong paths (W2 S1: operation__create_index direct invoke, W4 S6: skill__index_events{mode:drop} routing). Drift migrated from arg-key layer to action-name layer.
surface_fungibility.g31_match: 10/10 candidates tested: removing specifics causes LLM to substitute remaining vocabulary; surface area is partly fungible

incomplete_args_attractor.evidence: ARS expansion made rag.operation__recall visible. LLM attempts it but omits required 'sources' arg -> KeyError. B37 LLM had replied inline avoiding the error entirely.
incomplete_args_attractor.structural_implication: ARS scope expansion exposes previously-unreachable actions but does not guarantee LLM produces complete args. ARS guides arg NAMES but does not enforce REQUIRED arg presence.

new_structural_hypothesis.name: ARS effect domain: arg names guide, action selection unchanged
supporting_workers: W3 S2 (LLM file__list selection unchanged despite file__glob/grep in ARS)
W4 S6 (LLM skill__index_events instead of rag.operation__drop_source)
W2 S1 (LLM operation__create_index direct invoke instead of routing via invoke_action)
new_structural_hypothesis.implication: D2-wrapper / ARS scope expansion solves wrapper-path arg canonical (= structural arg-key fix verified), but LLM action preference is governed by separate mechanism (description content + frequency + scenario priors). Next batch fix candidates should NOT target ARS layer for action selection issues.

ghost_rejection_scope_limitation.finding: _is_valid_qualified_name (B38 fix) only validates structural shape (category/separator); does not validate action existence in current registry
ghost_rejection_scope_limitation.concrete_case: skill__create_skill passes structural check (valid category + separator + non-empty entry), only escaped invocation because freq+recency rank=23 outside top-20
ghost_rejection_scope_limitation.residual_risk: Usage pattern shift to <23 actions could re-expose the ghost
ghost_rejection_scope_limitation.fix_candidate_b39: Add registry-existence check after structural validation

judge_phase_fix_status.e2e_retest: untestable via W3 S8 scenario (= scenario asks LLM to evaluate inline text, judge_phase requires real artifact file). LLM passed 'artifact_path' literal -> 10 retries -> workflow_aborted. Scenario design mismatch, not fix failure.
judge_phase_fix_status.follow_up: B39+ scenario redesign needed for e2e verification

delta_v_decomposition.real_os_layer_wins: +4V worth (W6 phase_no_progress paths +2, W4 S1 canonical, W5 S3 canonical, W6 R-WEB routing) — most absorbed by INC since infra unreachable
delta_v_decomposition.surface_migration_noise: -3V (W3 S7 incomplete args, W4 S6 action drift, W2 INC->REF x3)
delta_v_decomposition.net: -3V mathematical with structural wins under-counted by measurement noise
